# Manpreet Singh - Technical Portfolio & LLM Context
> Full-stack software developer building production web applications with a focus on performance, reliability, and data consistency.

## Profile Summary
- **Name:** Manpreet Singh
- **Role:** Full-Stack Software Engineer
- **Location:** Abbotsford, BC, Canada
- **Portfolio:** https://manpreet-singh-npm.vercel.app/

---

## Technical Stack

### Languages & Core Concepts
- **Languages:** TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Java, C++
- **Core Competencies:** System Design, Database Design, Aggregation Pipelines, Performance Profiling, Memory Management, Rest API Architecture

### Frontend
- **Frameworks & Libraries:** React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Jotai

### Backend & Databases
- **Runtimes & Frameworks:** Node.js, Express, WebSocket, FastAPI
- **Databases & ORMs:** MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Prisma
- **Auth & Integrations:** JWT Authentication, Webhooks, Clerk, BetterAuth, Stripe, Clover API, ImageKit

### DevOps, Tools & Systems
- **Tools & Infrastructure:** Git, Docker, Vercel, Railway
- **Operating Systems:** Linux, Windows Server, Raspberry Pi (Embedded Systems)

---

## Key Projects

### 1. Canadian's Cart (Commercial / Contract)
- **Role:** Software Developer (February 2026 - Present)
- **Description:** A highly resilient multi-role e-commerce platform handling enterprise workflows for Administrators, Store Owners, Cashiers, and Customers.
- **Key Implementations:**
  - Designed complex MongoDB schemas and optimized aggregation pipelines for granular inventory management, invoice compilation, and automated store payouts.
  - Integrated full payment and media workflows utilizing Stripe, Clover, and ImageKit.
  - Mitigated race conditions and financial inconsistencies by implementing strict idempotency checks across all payment transactions.
  - Diagnosed and resolved severe Node.js Out-Of-Memory (OOM) errors and runtime performance bottlenecks using Clinic.js and deep backend profiling tools.
  - Engineered flexible role-based access control, secure session management, Redis-level caching layers, and high-performance fuzzy product search engines.

### 2. Igram
- **Status:** Deployed
- **URL:** https://igram-kappa.vercel.app/
- **Description:** Next.js e-commerce application featuring end-to-end user authentication and automated order state synchronization via Stripe webhooks.

### 3. GateKeep
- **Status:** Open Source
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Manpreet-Singh-2004/GateKeep
- **Description:** A physical-digital hardware integration using an ESP8266 microcontroller to build a Wi-Fi-based shopping cart control simulation. 
- **Technical Detail:** Evaluates signal proximity using RSSI values to accurately map physical spaces into shopping, checkout, and exit zones. Implements timed access control logic and hardware-triggered gate-lock behaviors simulating real-world asset protection workflows.

### 4. File Manager
- **Status:** Open Source
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Manpreet-Singh-2004/File-Manager
- **Description:** A secure, local FTP server engineered in Node.js featuring cryptographic verification via SHA-256 hashing to guarantee end-to-end file integrity and protection during high-volume transmittals.

---

## Professional & Academic Experience

### Canadian's Cart — Software Developer (February 2026 - Present) [Contract]
- **Focus:** Multi-role system architecture, payment systems security, backend performance optimization, and transactional data consistency.
- **Impact:** Architected data flows and complex MongoDB aggregation pipelines to seamlessly manage concurrent administrative, storefront, and cashier operational lifecycles. Eliminated critical financial edge cases by implementing strict idempotency layers across multi-channel payment integrations (Stripe and Clover). Leveraged profiling tools to resolve severe memory leaks, optimizing API responsiveness and ensuring system uptime under high concurrent user loads.

### Loblaws — UAPP (November 2024 - Present) [Part-Time]
- **Focus:** Real-time operational security and automated monitoring workflows.
- **Impact:** Monitored active real-time system alerts (including physical cart lock alarms) and conducted fast mitigation responses to avoid store operational disruptions. Executed structured patrols, logging high-accuracy anomaly incident reports.

### Paragon PMO — Business Analyst (May 2023 - September 2023) [Internship]
- **Focus:** Technical requirement elicitation, systems mapping, and database integrity.
- **Impact:** Authored 60+ production-ready user stories and highly detailed functional acceptance criteria. Created and maintained a relational database containing over 300+ structural examination queries to preserve strict tracking and traceability. Bridged alignment between UI/UX design, database engineering, and client-side project metrics.

### Digital Series — Digital Intern (April 2023 - June 2023) [Full-Time]
- **Focus:** Performance analysis, web updates, and SEO health.
- **Impact:** Implemented optimization workflows that directly enhanced search visibility. Maintained production web layouts and synthesized analytical reports tracking system-wide user engagement metrics.
